statement: Viðreisn (Reform Party) is led by Þorgerður Katrín Gunnarsdóttir, who serves as utanríkisráðherra (Foreign Minister) in the current government. She is an MP for Suðvesturkjördæmi. Viðreisn was founded in 2014 (originally as a political movement, became a party in 2016) with a pro-EU platform as a core policy. The party holds 11 Althingi seats and consistently advocates for completing EU accession negotiations. Other prominent Viðreisn MPs include Pawel Bartoszek (Reykjavíkurkjördæmi norður), Jón Gnarr (Reykjavíkurkjördæmi suður), and Hanna Katrín Friðriksson (Reykjavíkurkjördæmi norður, also Minister of Industries).
caveats: Party leadership may change at party congresses. Individual MP views may not fully align with the party platform.

related_entries.statement: The Althingi (Icelandic parliament) has 63 seats. As of session 157, 57 seats are held by sitting MPs. The party breakdown is: Sjálfstæðisflokkur (Independence Party) 13, Samfylkingin (Social Democrats) 13, Viðreisn (Reform Party) 11, Miðflokkurinn (Centre Party) 8, Flokkur fólksins (People's Party) 8, Framsóknarflokkur (Progressive Party) 4. The remaining 6 seats are vacant or held by alternates (varamenn).

Samfylkingin (Social Democrats) and Viðreisn (Reform Party) are the two Althingi parties that formally support EU membership. Samfylkingin has supported EU membership since 2007 and led the 2009 application process while in government. Viðreisn was founded in 2016 partly on a pro-EU platform and has consistently advocated for completing accession negotiations. Together they held approximately 17 of 63 Althingi seats after the 2024 elections.

citations.report_title: Ekki víst hvernig Evrópusambandið bregst við

claims.claim_text: Pavel Bartoszek er formaður utanríkismálanefndar Alþingis.

citations.report_title: Landbúnaðarstefna ESB henti íslenskum landbúnaði illa

claims.claim_text: Utanríkisráðherra lagði fram þingsályktunartillögu um þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslu um áframhaldandi aðildarviðræður.
Þjóðaratkvæðagreiðsla um ESB-aðild hefur verið eitt helsta baráttumál Viðreisnar.

citations.report_title: Trump sagður beita sér í ESB-umræðunni hér á landi

claims.claim_text: Þorgerður Katrín Gunnarsdóttir, utanríkisráðherra, varaði við því að erlend ríki reyndu að hafa afskipti af þjóðaratkvæðagreiðslunni þegar tilkynnt var um hana.
Utanríkisráðherra sagði að slík erlend afskipti yrðu ekki liðin, hvort sem þau væru af hálfu ESB eða annarra ríkja.
Þorgerður Katrín Gunnarsdóttir er utanríkisráðherra Íslands.
